title: Lofty WS1.3 commit window opened
body: Opened git:index/head claim c2f7012c-0b3b-4cde-8e18-df8d762c5704 after fetch confirmed HEAD 1bb369a5 and empty staged set. Enqueued intent 30422131-1478-4eb9-87cc-82b73975c71d for WS1.3 pathspecs only: .dependency-cruiser.mjs; packages/core/graph-core/README.md; package.json; src/data-factory/index.ts; src/data-factory/index.unit.test.ts; src/dataset/index.ts; src/dataset/index.unit.test.ts; src/index.ts; tsup.config.ts. Radiant WS2.1/root workspace files and collaboration-state residue are intentionally not in this bundle.
